The HTML Maze
by kyrylo

Flickering Shrine

Cracks glow with otherworldly light.
Protocols self-activate eerily.
Perimeter thins world boundaries.
Began with misspoken forbidden name.
Psychics shattered first.

Compass

N S E W
Go North Go South Go East Go West Go Up Go Down

Use the compass to navigate through the maze.

Writings on the Wall

  • Mr. Anderson!
  • NORTH!!!!
  • North are other stairs and Forrest view
  • don't go down
  • Give a monkey a gun and he is free
  • This is the right bottom corner of the maze on 2nd floor
  • I reached these stairs by going mostly south and east from the Abbey stairs... I was expecting another way UP
  • SESWSESEESWWSWSSSENNEESSEENNWNNESEEEESSU
  • I went up!
